title: crucianella gilanica subsp. damghanensis
intro: Crucianella gilanica subsp. damghanensis is a subspecies of the Crucianella gilanica plant, commonly known as Damghanan rock rose or Damghan rock thyme, a flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae). The medicinal properties of this plant include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of using Crucianella gilanica subsp. damghanensis include its potential to treat digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and improve respiratory health. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and essential oil extracts, which can be used topically or ingested to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
